case_title: FINNESTON, BENJAMIN M. VS BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,703.08 FILED BY FINNESTON, BENJAMIN M. AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
